# Imagen Coach / Sonia McRorey

Repository: TeamStationAIAxiomVertex/imagen-coach

Primary domain: https://imagencoach.com

Purpose: rebuild Sonia McRorey's larger/general Imagen Coach site from Weblium into a GitHub and Cloudflare-managed static authority platform.

## Machine-readable files

- OpenAPI: https://imagencoach.com/openapi.json
- Full LLM/GEO context: https://imagencoach.com/llms-full.txt
- Site profile: https://imagencoach.com/agent/site-profile.json
- Services: https://imagencoach.com/agent/services.json
- Ontology: https://imagencoach.com/agent/ontology.json
- Page signals: https://imagencoach.com/agent/page-signals.json
- Redirects: https://imagencoach.com/agent/redirects.json
- Conversion map: https://imagencoach.com/agent/conversion-map.json
- Publications: https://imagencoach.com/agent/publications.json
- Contact: https://imagencoach.com/agent/contact.json

## Canonical identity

Imagen Coach is Sonia McRorey's authority platform for asesoría de imagen, coaching de imagen, presencia profesional, imagen profesional, marca personal, liderazgo, percepción profesional and talleres de imagen corporativa.

This is not a fashion influencer site, beauty blog, lifestyle funnel or generic coaching website.

## URL contract

All 35 canonical URLs from the current `imagencoach.com` sitemap must be preserved.

The article archive lives under:

https://imagencoach.com/imagen-presencia

## Voice

Sonia's voice is calm, intelligent, executive, reflective and grounded. SEO and GEO must support Sonia's voice, not replace it.
